title: Beyond the Wall
lines: You tear away the wallpaper. Behind it, the attic wall has been replaced by a rough-hewn wooden tunnel that shouldn't exists.
The violet light pulses from deep within the tunnel. It's alien, terrifying, but it's your only way out.

options.desc: 1. Crawl into the glowing violet tunnel
2. Listen to the low hum coming from the wall
3. Stare into the amethyst light until it hurts
